$comment: saved_places write-model constants — personal bookmark data (a user's own saved list). Kept SEPARATE from community.json (the community write-path) so it is found by domain, not buried among SIGNAL_*/REPORT_REASONS. `collection` = the Firestore collection name. `limits` mirror the deployed firestore.rules for saved_places: placeId 1..200 chars, placeName 1..200 chars, placeType <=100 chars, photoName <=500 chars, placeLat -90..90, placeLng -180..180, rating 1..5. Emitted with the SAVED_PLACE_ domain prefix; each limit caps the FIELD it names, not the composite doc id.
